deals.reinvestment_policy: Reinvestment NOT available. All distributions are paid as cash.
deals.redemption_rules: Redemptions are handled on a case-by-case basis. Contact Katie Ginther directly.

general_notes: 1099-DIV tax forms are mailed and available in the portal by January 31.
Distributions are processed on the 15th of each month; allow 3–5 business days to appear in your bank account.
No DRIP (dividend reinvestment plan) is available for this fund.
For all redemption inquiries, escalate to Katie Ginther — do not commit to timelines.
